title: Stage 3 Impacts Evidence
body: "Fishing Gear Impacts Evidence  MMOs has carried out site level assessments of the impacts of fishing gear on protected features in Stage 3 MPAs.    Stage 3 Fishing Gear MPA Impacts Evidence: Summary - Stage 3 Fishing Gear MPA -   Impacts Evidence: Anchored Nets and Lines   Stage 3 Fishing Gear MPA Impacts Evidence: Bottom Towed Gear   Stage 3 Fishing Gear MPA Impacts Evidence: Traps    De-minimis assessment  This assessment considers the social and economic impacts of the proposed byelaws. "
